value.rationale: The fetched page is entirely about the Antigravity CLI's Permissions system — covering fine-grained permission rules, allow/deny/ask policies, supported actions (read_file, write_file, command, mcp, etc.), and configuration examples. There is no mention anywhere on the page of an Evals feature, a testing harness, running evaluations, or test suites against an agent's behavior. The claim is not substantiated by this page.
